HowItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your battle mode. Each game offers unique tactical challenges.

HowItWorks.step3Desc: Identify yourself and confirm the protocol to finalize deployment.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Secure your victory and climb the tactical leaderboard.

FAQ.q1: Wait, what's a Gel Blaster exactly?
FAQ.a1: Think of it as paint-less paintball. They fire tiny, eco-friendly water beads (Orbeez) that burst on impact. All the tactical rush, zero of the mess or intense sting.
FAQ.q2: Do I need to bring anything special?
FAQ.a2: Just closed-toe shoes and a warrior spirit. We provide the tactical vests, masks, and fully-charged gear. Wear comfortable clothes you can move in.
FAQ.q3: Is there an age limit for operatives?
FAQ.a3: We welcome warriors aged 12 and up for public sessions. Our gear is high-performance, and the arena relies on mobility and tactical awareness.
FAQ.q4: How many players in a squad?
FAQ.a4: The Arena is designed for 2v2 up to 3v3. Our online system limits bookings to 6 players to ensure maximum tactical density and movement space.
FAQ.q5: What happens if I'm running late?
FAQ.a5: Missions start strictly on schedule. Arrival >15m past your window may result in slot forfeiture without refund. Check-in 10 minutes prior.

Notice.heading: IMPORTANT PROTOCOL
Notice.body: All operatives must attend a safety briefing 10 minutes before deployment. Late arrival will compromise mission success.
